{"chapters": [{"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795199, "order": 1, "title": "I was backstabbed by my sister and reborn!", "name": "被妹妹背刺的我重生了!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795200, "order": 2, "title": "The Eye of Judgment! The Authority of the Ancient Gods!", "name": "审判之眼! 古神之权柄!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795201, "order": 3, "title": "Hidden profession! I am the shadow!", "name": "隐藏职业! 我即是暗影!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795202, "order": 4, "title": "Abandoned place of gods, Shell Town", "name": "神灵遗弃之地，贝壳小镇", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795203, "order": 5, "title": "You are so pretentious. I want to see how you die.", "name": "真够装的，我要看你怎么死", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795204, "order": 6, "title": "Crawlers? Kill instantly!", "name": "爬行者? 秒杀!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795205, "order": 7, "title": "The leaderboard is open! The first person in the town!", "name": "排行榜开启! 小镇第一人!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795206, "order": 8, "title": "Shocked the town! Killed the bronze boss alone?", "name": "震惊小镇! 单杀青铜BOSS?", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795207, "order": 9, "title": "Gold-level Greedy Hand! The world changes!", "name": "黄金级贪婪之手! 世界大变!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795208, "order": 10, "title": "I won't contact him.", "name": "我才不会主动联系他呢", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795209, "order": 11, "title": "Kill the polluter instantly! Wang Meng is shocked!", "name": "秒杀污染者! 王猛的震惊!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795210, "order": 12, "title": "Poison darts! One skill to kill the boss instantly!", "name": "猛毒飞镖! 一个技能，秒杀BOSS!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795211, "order": 13, "title": "There are so many creepers, what the hell am I supposed to do?", "name": "这么多爬行者，我玩尼玛?", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795212, "order": 14, "title": "Pay 10 million and let the shadow boss help you upgrade?", "name": "出一千万，让暗影大佬带升级?", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795213, "order": 15, "title": "Ice Cone Spell for Sale! The Condescending Lady", "name": "出售冰锥术! 居高临下的大小姐", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795214, "order": 16, "title": "Ruthless Jiang Li! Is this money so easy to take?", "name": "心狠手辣的江梨! 这钱是那么好拿的?", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795215, "order": 17, "title": "Kill the silver boss! Gold-level equipment!", "name": "斩杀白银BOSS! 黄金级装备!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795216, "order": 18, "title": "Instant Shadow Slash! Diamond-level Hand of Greed!", "name": "瞬影斩! 钻石级贪婪之手!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795217, "order": 19, "title": "Qin Xiaoyou: Anyone who has reached level 3 now is definitely a big shot!", "name": "秦小悠：现在升到3级的，绝对是大佬!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795218, "order": 20, "title": "Shocked! Could Shadow be a time traveler?", "name": "震惊! 暗影该不会是穿越者吧?", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795219, "order": 21, "title": "Space Ring! Gold Level BOSS!", "name": "空间指环! 黄金级BOSS!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795220, "order": 22, "title": "Tracking? Instant Kill! Rage Zone!", "name": "跟踪? 瞬杀! 狂暴区域!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795221, "order": 23, "title": "A chance to take over the BOSS? The whole team is wiped out on the spot!", "name": "接手BOSS的机会? 当场团灭!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795222, "order": 24, "title": "The first gold kill in the entire server! Shocked the world!", "name": "全服黄金首杀! 震惊全球!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}, {"serie_id": 6554, "id": 9795223, "order": 25, "title": "Epic Greedy Hand! Will-O-Wisp Bell!", "name": "史诗级贪婪之手! 鬼火铃铛!", "updated_at": "2025-02-23 07:29:04.512+00"}]}
